docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $567.47 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VINDEL, LEANA MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LEANA MARIA VINDEL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VINDEL, LEANA MARIA $567.47 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $647.47 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
